options.content:
### Etcd Availability - Fleet Summary

This dashboard summarizes etcd availability across **all** HCP regional Prometheus workspaces.

**Aggregation methodology:**
- **Counts and totals** (clusters monitored, total leader changes, stable cluster count, total/worst DB size): mathematically correct fleet-wide sum/max via Grafana's `Mixed` datasource + `Reduce` transform.
- **Latency percentiles** (`Worst Regional P99 ...`): show the **highest p99 observed in any single region**, NOT a true cross-region p99. PromQL cannot reconstruct a histogram across independent Prometheus workspaces. Use these tiles as an "is any region degraded?" signal. A true fleet p99 requires observability infrastructure work (Thanos / Mimir / federated workspace).
- **Violator tables**: concatenated rows from every regional workspace; each row is one offending cluster.
- **Per-cluster timeseries**: lines from every cluster in every region overlaid on one chart.

**Health Targets:**
- Leader stability: < 5 changes per 24h
- No excessive leader churn (> 3 changes/hour)

**Performance SLOs (per region, 99th percentile):**
- WAL fsync duration: < 10ms
- Backend commit duration: < 25ms
- Peer network RTT: < 50ms

panels.description: Total number of HCP clusters across the fleet with stable etcd leadership in the last 24 hours (<=5 leader changes). Computed by summing per-region stable-cluster counts.
panels.title: Fleet Total Stable Clusters (24h)

panels.description: Total etcd leader changes observed across the entire fleet in the last 24 hours. Sum across regions of per-cluster max leader-change counts.
panels.title: Fleet Total Leader Changes (24h)

panels.description: Total number of HCP clusters across the fleet currently emitting etcd metrics. Sum of per-region cluster counts.
panels.title: Fleet Clusters Monitored

panels.description: Highest regional p99 WAL fsync duration across the fleet (max of per-region p99s). NOTE: this is NOT a true cross-region p99; PromQL cannot aggregate histograms across independent Prometheus workspaces. Use this as a "any region degraded?" signal. SLO target per region: < 10ms.
panels.title: Worst Regional P99 WAL Fsync (5m)

panels.description: Highest regional p99 backend commit duration across the fleet. NOT a true cross-region p99 (see WAL Fsync panel description). SLO target per region: < 25ms.
panels.title: Worst Regional P99 Backend Commit (5m)

panels.description: Highest regional p99 etcd peer network RTT across the fleet. NOT a true cross-region p99 (see WAL Fsync panel description). SLO target per region: < 50ms.
panels.title: Worst Regional P99 Peer RTT (5m)

panels.description: Largest etcd DB size observed on any cluster in any region. Useful for capacity / outlier detection.
panels.title: Fleet Worst Cluster DB Size

panels.description: Clusters exceeding WAL fsync SLO (> 10ms at p99) - Lists clusters with slow disk write performance. Check disk IOPS and storage health.

targets.expr: max by (cluster) (histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (cluster, instance, le) (rate(etcd_disk_wal_fsync_duration_seconds_bucket{cluster!=""}[5m]))) * 1000) > 10

panels.title: WAL Fsync SLO Violations

panels.description: Clusters exceeding backend commit SLO (> 25ms at p99) - Lists clusters with slow database commits. May indicate disk or CPU pressure.

targets.expr: max by (cluster) (histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (cluster, instance, le) (rate(etcd_disk_backend_commit_duration_seconds_bucket{cluster!=""}[5m]))) * 1000) > 25

panels.title: Backend Commit SLO Violations

panels.description: Clusters exceeding peer RTT SLO (> 50ms at p99) - Lists clusters with high network latency between etcd peers. Check network health and node placement.

targets.expr: max by (cluster) (histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (cluster, instance, le) (rate(etcd_network_peer_round_trip_time_seconds_bucket{cluster!=""}[5m]))) * 1000) > 50

panels.title: Peer RTT SLO Violations

panels.description: Clusters with excessive leader instability (> 3 changes per hour) - Lists clusters experiencing frequent leader elections, indicating potential network or performance issues.
panels.title: Leader Instability (Hourly)

panels.description: Clusters with high leader churn (> 10 changes in 24h) - Lists clusters exceeding the stability threshold. Investigate network issues or resource constraints.
panels.title: Clusters with High Leader Churn

panels.description: Clusters with unstable leaders (> 5 changes in 24h) - Lists clusters approaching or exceeding the warning threshold for leader changes.
panels.title: Clusters with Unstable Leaders

panels.description: Distribution of etcd health across fleet - Shows count of stable vs. unstable clusters based on leader change frequency over 24 hours.
panels.title: Etcd Health Distribution

panels.description: Per-cluster leader change rate over time - Shows the rate of leader elections per minute for each cluster. Lower values indicate better stability.
panels.title: Per-Cluster Leader Changes Rate

panels.description: Leader changes per cluster (1h window) - Shows the number of leader elections in a rolling 1-hour window for each cluster. Helps identify instability patterns.
panels.title: Per-Cluster Leader Changes (1h window)

panels.description: Clusters with large database size (> 4GB) - Lists clusters with databases exceeding 50% of default quota. May need compaction or have excessive keys.
panels.title: Clusters with Large DB Size

panels.description: Per-cluster p99 disk latency (WAL fsync and backend commit) across the fleet, one line per cluster. Cluster IDs are unique fleet-wide.
panels.title: Fleet Disk Performance P99 (per-cluster lines)

panels.description: Per-cluster p99 etcd peer-network RTT across the fleet, one line per cluster.
panels.title: Fleet Network Performance P99 (per-cluster lines)

panels.description: Fleet-wide proposal metrics over time
panels.title: Fleet Proposal Metrics (per-cluster lines)
